summary: Bug fix verified: Creative Editor now correctly loads and displays banner sizes when editing existing creatives. Fixed additional issue where Live Preview dimensions label showed incorrect size for custom-sized creatives.
critical_code_review_comments: loadCreative() now correctly uses getCreative(id) API instead of getCreatives() for better efficiency
Banner size setting code at lines 210-222 correctly matches width/height against BANNER_SIZES array
Fixed Live Preview dimensions label to use customWidth/customHeight when useCustomSize is true
Fixed renderPreview() to use correct dimensions for custom-sized banners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creative Editor bug fix verified. Two fixes applied: 1) loadCreative() uses getCreative(id) API directly, 2) Live Preview dimensions label now correctly shows custom sizes. Test creatives: Updated Ak (728x90) shows 'Leaderboard (728x90)' in dropdown and '728x90' in Live Preview. Test (320x480) shows 'Use Custom Size' checked with correct width/height fields and '320x480' in Live Preview.

tests_passed.test: 320x480 creative loads with 'Use Custom Size' checked
320x480 creative shows correct width (320) and height (480) fields
Bid response for 728x90 returns correct creative with w=728, h=90
Bid response for 320x480 returns correct creative with w=320, h=480

fix_applied: loadCreative() changed to use getCreative(id) API directly
renderPreview() now uses customWidth/customHeight when useCustomSize is true
Live Preview dimensions label now correctly displays custom sizes

rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: loadCreative() was using getCreatives() to fetch all creatives and then find by ID. Main agent fixed this by using getCreative(id) API directly. Additional issue found during testing: Live Preview dimensions label always showed selectedSize.w/h even when useCustomSize was true, causing 320x480 creative to show '300x250' in Live Preview. Fixed by using conditional logic to show customWidth/customHeight when useCustomSize is true.
